selected_shadow_review_question.name: late_repair90_strict_close_source_link_transfer_no_order_review
selected_shadow_review_question.question: In a bounded live/no-order same-host window, does the source-truth-validated strict close pattern keep enough sample while preserving pair-cost tail, residual-share, and source-link transition quality under late_repair_only_after_s=90?
selected_shadow_review_question.mechanism_under_review: late_repair_only_after_s=90 with pairing_only_when_residual and source-link diagnostics; no fill-to-balance, no portfolio ledger, no price caps, no static target/cap sweep, no cooldown/admission cap.
why_this_question_now: Replay source-truth now validates diversified real strict close actions across 60 distinct conditions and all allowed days.

Prior source-link cross-bucket diagnostic failed because residual risk was broad; the next shadow-review question must test live/no-order transfer quality, not re-run the same frozen cross-bucket hypothesis.
Runner already has default-off event_lite, pair_source, and source_link_transition summaries needed for no-order review without pulling events JSONL.

checks: shared-ingress broker_manifest.json present and fresh enough for read-only client context
root disk and inode usage below exhaustion thresholds
sudo -n -u pmofi availability if the same-host runner is approved

research_keep_requires.strict_close_source_link_review: event_lite.source_link_transition_diagnostics and pair_source diagnostics must explain admitted pair/close paths without broad residual-risk concentration

unknown_or_tradeoff_if: candidates are below 100 but all risk gates pass
source-link diagnostics are present but cannot distinguish repair/pairing-improving paths from risk-increasing paths
bare pair economics are positive but normalized residual or pair-tail budgets still fail
required event-lite/source-link summary fields are absent
discard_if: residual risk remains broad across admitted source-link buckets
only summary-only removal would improve metrics
candidate sample is destroyed by a retrospective filter
results imply frozen mechanisms such as fill-to-balance90, portfolio-ledger, source/public price caps, static caps, cooldown/admission caps, or dynamic risk-state gate without a new local KEEP

source_truth_boundary.source_kind: replay_store_v2 plus future no-order summary diagnostics only
source_truth_boundary.interpretation: This artifact selects a bounded no-order shadow-review question. It is not approval to start EC2/shadow/canary and not promotion evidence.

research_ranking.label: KEEP_STRICT_CLOSE_NO_ORDER_SHADOW_REVIEW_QUESTION_SELECTED
research_ranking.interpretation: The diversified strict close replay source-truth KEEP is sufficient to define a precise no-order shadow-review question, but not sufficient to run or promote without explicit approval and a future bounded result.

next_action.description: Wait for exact main-thread approval before any EC2/no-order shadow preflight or run. If approval is not given, continue local-only verifier/spec work; do not start remote work from heartbeat alone.
next_action.executable_if_approved: Run bounded safety preflight for late_repair90_strict_close_source_link_transfer_no_order_review, then start only the approved no-order dry-run shadow if preflight passes.
